name: EventFlow AI: Human-Centric Venue Intelligence
description: A high-performance, enterprise-grade venue management ecosystem. Features real-time crowd routing via weighted heuristics, virtual queuing with predictive wait-time estimation, and a Gemini 1.5 Flash-powered AI Concierge. Built with a robust Express/Vite full-stack architecture, BigQuery-simulated analytics, and strict WCAG 2.1 accessibility compliance.
